assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and can receive email when the selected route requires it.
No platform account, tenant, credentials, or product resources exist yet unless the goal explicitly requires an existing artifact.

developer_goal: Create an OVHcloud account and Public Cloud project, launch a first public Linux instance, and obtain an authenticated remote shell.

first_success.outcome: OVHcloud reports the first Linux Public Cloud instance Enabled and the developer has logged in through SSH.
first_success.observable_signal: The instance table shows Enabled and ssh username@IPv4 opens the remote command line.

route_selection.surface: OVHcloud Control Panel account creation and Public Cloud getting started
route_selection.rule: Reconstruct complete official candidate routes, prefer no payment/admin/approval when possible, then minimize required actions; leave consequential ties unresolved.

candidates.name: Create account, Public Cloud project, then Linux instance with SSH
candidates.reason: Account-type choice and regional payment or anti-fraud checks change required fields; default model, image, and location are not universal.

candidates.name: Order-first account creation during service purchase
candidates.reason: Official docs allow creating the account during first order, which interleaves payment differently.

required_path.action: Create an OVHcloud account with tax residence, credentials, email code, account type, and identity details.

required_fields.label: Identity and contact details for the chosen account type

required_path.observable_result: The OVHcloud account is created and Control Panel access is available.

required_path.action: Create a Public Cloud project and complete required payment or voucher steps.

required_fields.label: Project creation and payment or voucher details

required_path.observable_result: An active Public Cloud project is available.

required_path.action: Create SSH keys and launch a public Linux instance with unresolved defaults.
required_path.observable_result: The instance reaches Enabled with a public IPv4 address.

required_path.action: Complete first SSH login as the image's preconfigured user.

prerequisites.description: A valid email address is required to create the account.

external_gates.description: Payment instruments and regional anti-fraud checks for Public Cloud project activation.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email one-time code delivery during signup.

platform_outcomes.description: OVHcloud creates the account after email verification and profile submission.
OVHcloud provisions the Public Cloud instance.

excluded.reason: Reading is excluded from required actions.

sources.title: Creating your first OVHcloud Public Cloud project
How to create a Public Cloud instance and connect to it
Creating and using SSH authentication keys

uncertainties.question: Which payment instruments, authorization amounts, and anti-fraud checks apply by region?
uncertainties.impact: These change whether first project creation is self-service.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Regional walkthrough evidence for a fresh account creating a Public Cloud project.

uncertainties.question: Which model, Linux image, and location should be the universal tutorial default?
uncertainties.impact: These change required fields and price.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Official current default recommendation for first-instance tutorials.
